arts.ttl: I saw what Pep Guardiola did at full-time after difficult 90 minutes for Man City
arts.sum: Manchester City beat Fulham 3-2 in the Premier League, but the scoreline doesn't reflect the struggles they faced during the game.

arts.ttl: Mateo Kovacic’s newly discovered eye for goal only hides how fragile Manchester City can be
arts.sum: Manchester City 3-2 Fulham: Kovacic twice found the back of the net as Pep Guardiola’s team came from behind to triumph at the Etihad Stadium

arts.ttl: Man City 3-2 Fulham: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Kovacic nets brace
arts.sum: Manchester City survive a late scare after coming from behind to scrape past Fulham 3-2 in Sunday's Premier League encounter at the Etihad.

arts.ttl: Man City player ratings vs Fulham as Ederson saves but Erling Haaland blanks
arts.sum: Manchester City player ratings for their Premier League win over Fulham with goals from Mateo Kovacic and Jeremy Doku

arts.ttl: MAN CITY 3-2 FULHAM PLAYER RATINGS: Which star spared the champions? And who was 'peripheral' for much of the afternoon?
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN AT THE ETIHAD STADIUM: Pep Guardiola's side made a shaky start and fell behind when Andreas Pereira volleyed Fulham in front following a cheeky assist from Raul Jimenez.

arts.ttl: Mateo Kovacic at the double as Manchester City come from behind against Fulham
arts.sum: Kovacic, filling in for the injured Rodri, scored a double either side of half-time.

arts.ttl: 'That is amazing': Ian Wright wowed by what he's seen from £100k-a-week Fulham player v Man City today
arts.sum: Fulham had the unenviable task of trying to get a result away at Manchester City on Saturday afternoon. The Cottagers gave a good account of...

arts.ttl: City equal our longest Premier League unbeaten run
arts.sum: The unbeaten run is just the latest incredible achievement for Guardiola, who is the second most successful manager in the Premier League’s history with six titles. We have won 24 of the 30 matches, scoring 77 goals along the way as we put together an incredible run to win last season’s Premier League title.

arts.ttl: Man City fans make public plea to Pep Guardiola: 'Stay!'
arts.sum: Manchester City fans hung a giant banner inside Etihad Stadium on Saturday with a special message for Pep Guardiola ahead of their Premier League game against Fulham. City has been crowned champion six out of the last seven years and won the treble — including the Champions League and FA Cup in 2023.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola reveals fate of Man City's request to delay start of 2025/26 Premier League season
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has revealed that Manchester City's request to postpone their first two games of the 2024/25 season due to FIFA Club World Cup commitments has been rejected. "The Premier League has not allowed us to postpone the first two games for our recovery," Guardiola said.
